data.title: Write RED structural boundary test for sonnet+opus escalation sub-steps in sprint SKILL.md
data.description:
## What
Create `tests/skills/test-sprint-sc-coverage-escalation.sh` that structurally validates the sonnet and opus escalation sub-steps added to sprint SKILL.md by story 536e-3683.

## File Impact
- CREATE: `tests/skills/test-sprint-sc-coverage-escalation.sh`
- EDIT: `.test-index` (add mapping + RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
The test must fail RED before the 536e-3683 implementation tasks run, and pass GREEN after.

Structural checks (all must be present in `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md`):
1. Sub-step 2a2 heading (e.g. "2a2" within a preplanning gate section)
2. Reference to `sc-coverage-sonnet.md` prompt file
3. Language indicating COVERED/MISSING/UNSURE verdict collection per SC
4. Language indicating that UNSURE SCs are escalated (list passed to opus)
5. Sub-step 2a3 heading (e.g. "2a3" within a preplanning gate section)
6. Reference to `sc-coverage-opus.md` prompt file
7. Conditional early-exit language (opus dispatch only when UNSURE list is non-empty)
8. `REPLAN_TRIGGER: sc_coverage` language in routing section
9. `/dso:preplanning` routing when child has type:story language
10. `/dso:implementation-plan` routing when all children type:task language

`.test-index` changes:
- Add: `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md: test-sprint-sc-coverage-escalation.sh`
- Add RED marker comment: `# [test_sc_coverage_escalation]`

## testing_mode
RED — new structural boundary test; must fail before implementation

## Done Definition
- Test file exists and is executable
- Test runs and fails (RED) on current SKILL.md (before 536e-3683 implementation)
- `.test-index` entries added
